tools.description:
Execute a KQL query against Microsoft Defender Advanced Hunting.

    Returns security telemetry from devices, emails, identities, and cloud apps.
    Results limited to 10 000 rows / 30 days of data.

query.description: KQL query to execute. Must reference valid Advanced Hunting tables (e.g. DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceNetworkEvents, EmailEvents). Use 'ago()' for time ranges, 'project' to select columns, and 'limit' to control result size.
query.title: Query

timespan.description: Optional ISO 8601 duration (e.g. 'P1D', 'P7D', 'P30D'). Defaults to the query's own time filter.
timespan.title: Timespan

tools.name: run_hunting_query

tools.description: Run selected threat-hunting modules with bounded concurrency and explicit failures.
tools.name: run_threat_hunt_suite

tools.description: Validate KQL query syntax without executing it.
tools.name: validate_kql_query
